name: Push Up
description: Bodyweight horizontal press for chest, shoulders, and triceps.
instructions: Start in a plank with hands under shoulders.
Lower until chest is close to the floor.
Press back to a straight-arm plank.

name: Bodyweight Squat
description: Foundational squat pattern for quads and glutes.
instructions: Stand with feet about shoulder-width apart.
Sit hips down and back while keeping chest tall.
Drive through the feet to stand.

name: Plank
description: Isometric core brace for trunk endurance.
instructions: Set forearms on the floor with elbows under shoulders.
Brace ribs down and squeeze glutes.

name: Dumbbell Row
description: Single-arm pull for lats and upper back.
instructions: Hinge with one hand supported on a bench.
Pull the dumbbell toward the hip.
Lower under control with shoulder packed.

name: Dumbbell Romanian Deadlift
description: Hip hinge for hamstrings and glutes.
instructions: Hold dumbbells at the thighs with soft knees.
Hinge hips back until hamstrings stretch.
Stand by driving hips forward without rounding the back.
